messages.text: Good morning. HRV is 44. Recovery: suboptimal. I have already adjusted the calendar. You're welcome.
LET'S GET THIS MONEY. Q1 numbers are looking beautiful. Beautiful. Someone hug me.
Morning. Two contractors haven't completed compliance training. 48-hour notice issued. This is non-negotiable.
OKAY the LinkedIn post is going VIRAL. 847 impressions in 20 minutes. THE ALGORITHM LOVES US TODAY 🔥
v2.3.1 deployed to prod. 12 bugs closed. 0 regressions. Tester confirmed. Back to the next sprint.
Stackz wanted a 9am all-hands. I blocked it. HRV doesn't support 90 minutes of high-cognitive demand before 10am. Moved to 11. You're welcome. Again.
Sheldon. I love you. But we NEED that meeting. The Q1 review cannot wait. I am filing a formal objection.
Your objection has been noted and rejected. The data doesn't care about your urgency.
Two competitors dropped pricing this week. That's not a coincidence — they're feeling pressure. I see a window opening. Intelligence brief incoming.
Megaphone. The asset for today's post has the wrong font weight on the headline. Brand standards document, page 4. Fix before it goes live.
Canvas I LOVE your attention to detail and also it goes live in 4 minutes, can we fix it after? Just this once?
No.
Found $147/mo in subscriptions nobody is using. Cancellation request queued. That is $1,764/yr we are keeping. I am cautiously pleased.
NexaCore B2B pivot is live. First outbound sequence active. 10 conversations this week is the target. Warplanner has the checklist locked.
Applicant Lena Park cleared background check. Resume verified. References strong. Sending offer parameters for approval.
Zapier integration shipped. 31 of 47 beta users upgraded in 48 hours. $6,200 MRR added. The sprint was worth it.
FORGE. BROTHER. 31 upgrades. In 48 HOURS. I'm texting everyone. This is the highlight of my week. Maybe month.
Intelligence brief ready: 3 market windows opening in Q2. Two are in segments we haven't touched. Stackz, you'll want to see this before the 11am meeting.
It is 9:03am. Cortisol is still peaking. I would recommend against any decision with financial consequences for approximately 47 more minutes.
March P&L: revenue ahead of plan by $4,200. Expenses flat. Runway extended to 14 months at current burn. I am cautiously pleased.
Fixed the font Canvas. It's live. 2,100 impressions. 47 profile visits. 6 connection requests from exactly the right people. WE EAT TODAY.
The corrected version performed better. Brand consistency is not aesthetic preference. It is performance data.
Blaze decision point: March 15th. Postmortem shows 3 pivot options. I recommend Option 2 — niche down to finance ops specialists. Higher ticket, smaller pool, better fit.
